generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor integrated into building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor integrated into building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Light sensor integrated into building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightSensor
]

instance TemperatureDataStream : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data stream processed via Eclipse Hono and Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance OccupancyDataStream : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data stream processed via Eclipse Hono and Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance LightDataStream : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time lighting status data stream processed via Eclipse Hono and Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model enriched with Building Control System (BCS) semantics including device metadata, spatial geometry, and component relationships"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AutodeskRevit, MDETools
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting system actuator configured within BIM models"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC control actuator configured within BIM models"
]

instance AutodeskRevit : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Revit for BIM modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMModelingService
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, EnergyOptimizationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for 3D visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance MDETools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering tools for automated transformation of BIM models to runtime artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy optimization using reinforcement learning"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionReport
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for facility management"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceAlert, ComfortAnalysis
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization via Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizeBuildingModel
]

instance BIMModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "BIM modeling service using Autodesk Revit"
    DTDFVocab:provides BIMModelInsight
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance alerts derived from sensor data and simulations"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionReport : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Energy consumption reports derived from sensor data and simulations"
]

instance ComfortAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comfort analysis derived from sensor data and simulations"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building systems status"
]

instance VisualizeBuildingModel : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building model"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance BIMModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "BIM model enriched with BCS semantics"
]

instance LightingControlComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lighting control service operating as independent component in modular architecture"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Energy optimization service operating as independent component in modular architecture"
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service operating as independent component in modular architecture"
]

instance VisualizationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization service operating as independent component in modular architecture"
]

instance BuildingLivingLab : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure in AECO domain, Living Lab case study"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor, LightSensor, LightingActuator, HVACActuator, BIMModel, RealTimeMonitoringService, EnergyOptimizationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, InteractiveVisualizationService, LightingControlComponent, EnergyOptimizationComponent, PredictiveAnalyticsComponent, VisualizationComponent
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., lighting setpoints, HVAC adjustments) generated by DT services and sent via Eclipse Hono to physical actuators for real-time adjustments."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization of sensor data and control commands with minimal latency for operational monitoring; simulation and optimization services execute at intervals determined by system configuration."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A centralized hub integrating BIM models, Eclipse Hono for IoT data ingestion, Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management, and Unreal Engine 5 for visualization, with modular services connected via standardized extension points to enable coordination between physical assets, data streams, and user-facing services."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase ('as operated'), extending BIM's design-time focus to include continuous lifecycle management from construction through refurbishment during building usage."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to assess interoperability and architectural soundness, with ongoing synchronization techniques to address semantic drift and ensure alignment between digital models and physical counterparts."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol with TLS encryption for secure data transmission between physical assets and Eclipse Hono, with Ditto managing digital twin state and communication."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Cloud-based deployment of Eclipse Hono and Ditto as middleware services, with Unreal Engine visualization hosted on web servers or local workstations; the framework utilizes scalable containerized microservices architecture."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external Building Management Systems (BMS), IoT platforms, and enterprise systems via standardized APIs (e.g., REST, MQTT) to enable cross-system data exchange and interoperability within the AECO ecosystem."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to BIM standards (e.g., IFC schema), MQTT protocol specifications, Eclipse Ditto's digital twin management standards, and standardized extension points for service integration."
]
